title: Qv Mortar And Pestle
description: Stop getting your hands dirty! Use a mortar and pestle for grinding.
body: This mod adds a "mortar and pestle" block in which you can grind and mix items. To put an item, press right-click to take, press right-click with an empty hand to grind press Shift+right-click To change or add your recipe, go to the mod function "mortarandpestle:craft"
